creator: larshenrikoern@outlook.dk
text:
Hi

I am on 14-STABLE. I am trying to get synth to compile. But synth scans the entire ports-tree and gives the following message: "synth prepare-system
Regenerating flavor index: this may take a while ...
Scanning entire ports tree.
 progress: 56.36%              
culprit: math/libflame
  Scan aborted because 'make' encounted an error in the Makefile.
  math/libflame (return code = 1)
Flavor index generation failed: ports scan"

I am not sure what the error is. I see a possible problem in the first CONFIGURE_ARGS= instead of CONFIGURE_ARGS+= . But I am, not sure. 

I have being using synth for some time. And this is the first error ever. Except for a few packages not built. But that is OK.

Have a nice day
Lars H
